titleStmt.title: SII 7.325: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 325. (A.R. No. 135 of 1901). ON A SLAB LYING NEAR THE WELL IN THE GOPALAKRISHNA TEMPLE AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraśjuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāyaśaṁbhavē . svasti . śrīmatsyakābda 1302 neya ravudrisaṁvatsaradalu śrī
madrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāśegetappuvarāyaragaṁḍa
pū¨rvvapaścimadakṣiṇasamudrādhipati śrīvīrahariharamahārāyara rājyābhyuda
yadalu rāyana nirūpadiṁ śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ boṁmarsa Oḍeyaru bārakūrurājya
va nāḷuva kāladalu kumāramādhavasvāmigaḷu bārakūra maṭhadali tāU pratiṣṭeyya mā
ḍida gopināthadēvara dēvasvada kuḷḷava baradunaṭṭasyāsanada kramaveṁteṁdaḍe pū[¨rvva]dali svā
mi dēvarāyanu sūriya grahaṇadali dhārāpū¨rbbakavāgi śilāsyāsanava naṭṭu koṭṭa bhaṁ
ḍḍiya maṭhadūra haḍikeya hoṁnanū naḍava manuśyana jīvitavanū naṣṭeyanukkaḷaba
mūṟu bhāgiya māḍi Alli Oṁddu bhāgi hoṁniṁda hoṟagaṇa saumyadēvaralli varuṣaṁprati dha
nu¨rmāsa 16 hōhalli śivagaṁgeya pratiṣṭheya māḍida dina raṁgapūje brāhmaṇabhōjanava naḍi
si vēdādhyayanakke ga 12 hoṁnanū koṭṭu hoṁnu mikkade saumyadēvariṁgekuḍuUdubha
ṁḍiyamaṭhada teṁkkadēvarige Oṁdu bhāgeya hoṁniṁda dinaṁprati rudrapūjeya 3 varu brā
hmariṁge naḍasi hoṁnu mikkade teṁkkadēvariṁge kuḍuUdu Oṁdu bhāgiya hoṁnu tappu
voppu modalāda tējōpā¨rjjane Ā Ura Oḍetana gōpināthadēvariṁge Ā Atāradalu Ava
ya bāḷu Ottinamēle koUraOḷage sarakkada kāṇu bāḷu bekkāṭiyalli haḷenīra bāḷu hāneya
haḷiyali lokkiya haḍuhina tōṭa Ādakke EraḍuĀre mūḍeya teṟa modalāda pramā
ṇadiṁ hoṁnu 3 nū saumyadēvariṁge gaṁdhakke koṭṭu kaṭṭeya cappara Āṟavaṭṭigeyanū naḍsu
vadhu bhaṁḍiyamaṭhadali mūlada tōṭa 2 yiṣṭū gōpināthadēvariṁgge bīḍu dēvasva I Āya
diṁda dēvariṁge dinaṁprati naivēdya 3 hāne Ākki naṁdāveḷakuge rudrapūjege 3 varu brāhma
ṇarū Āśraṁṇaṁga Āki hāne 1 naimittikakṣīrābdhi hūvinatōṭa jī¨rṇōddhārava māḍuvaru . Ivasu
vanū Āyyanavaru modalāgi Ārukoḷasalladu . koṁḍavaru nissaṁttānavāgi narakadali bī
ḷuvaru gruhastaru Āyyanavaru Ādare hiriyātaṁgallade kiḻiyavariṁge Uṁbaḷi bhā
gi salladu . yi dha¨rmmada pālaneya muṟukēriya 3 varu seṭṭikāṟaru samastahalaru cala
dākṣiṁṇyalōbharahitarāgi māḍuvaru . māḍadiddare 3 varu dēvara kitta dōṣa bhaṁḍḍi
yamaṭhadalli kallasaṁkkaṭiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu hoḷeyiṁ baḍagalu vipravāḷiya keṟeya naṭṭi
ralliṁ mūḍalu Āṟayiṁ teṁkkalu dēvara mane Arita holeyara Aṁkaseṭṭi baṁṭṭa parabhā
ḷige jananasalladu I Aḍakava tappidaḍe 1 tale 1000 hoṁnu Arsiṁge daṁḍḍa . svadattāṁ para
dattāṁ vvā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . śaṣṭi¨rvvaruśasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . dā
napālanayō¨rmmadhyē dānātsrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānātsva¨rggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ pa
daṁ . śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 7.325 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
